title: Black Tights
writer: Roland Petit, Edmond Rostand, Prosper Mérimée
actors: Maurice Chevalier, Les Ballets de Paris, Zizi Jeanmaire
plot: Live scenes of Paris and a continuity Narrator link together four dramatic re-enactments of original ballet creations by Roland Petit and his ensemble, Ballets de Paris: Carmen (1949), La croqueuse de diamants (1950), Deuil en 24 ...
